programmes.show_description: That's right, Crocs has launched at QVC! Discover the iconic footwear brand and stay light on your feet with shoes that feel oh-so-comfortable. Marvellously modern!
Discover the world of Oisha - elegant jewellery that you'll treasure forever. Exquisitely crafted in India, each captivating piece will sit on your skin as a work of art in breath-taking detail.
Tune in for style advice and inspiration from Ruth, plus find everything from a great pair of jeans and a stylish jacket, to chic pieces featuring pops of colour and vibrant print.

programmes.show_name: In the Garden with Thompson & Morgan
programmes.show_description: Enjoy gorgeous plants and flowers in your garden from Thompson & Morgan, one of the UK's oldest horticulture firms and an established household name for gardeners across the country.
Discover an exciting range or rare, unusual, exciting, and most of all beautiful plants that will bring an abundance of charm and colour to your outdoor space.

programmes.show_description: Showcasing great colours, quality fabrics, exciting shapes and free fashion advice. Our ranges are made for real women who demand good quality, realistic prices and clothes that look and feel great!
